---
title: "Data input"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
author: "Nils Müller-Scheeßel"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data_preparation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(baytaAAR)
```

Possible data structure

Data input must be a matrix. 

The levels should start at 1. Binary data is possible.

Mixed levels should be an absolute no-go.

The nodes (= rows of the matrix) do not have to be fully observed.
